1324: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1325:   env: Env,
1326:   workspaceId: string,
1327:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1328: ): Promise<{
1329:   ok: boolean;
1330:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1331:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1332:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
1333: }> {
1334:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1335:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1336:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1337:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1338:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1339:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1340:   }
1341:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });
1342: 
1343:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1344:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
1345:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
1346:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1347:   try {
1348:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
1349:   } catch (error) {
1350:     checks.push({
1351:       code: 'project_root',
1352:       ok: false,
1353:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1354:     });
1355:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1356:   }
1357:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1358:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);
1359:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
1360:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
1361:   const provider = options?.provider ?? getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
1362:   const outputDir = parseString(options?.outputDir);
1363: 
1364:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1365:     if (!outputDir) {
1366:       checks.push({
1367:         code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
1368:         ok: false,
1369:         details: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider',
1370:       });
1371:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1372:     }
1373: 
1374:     const effectiveOutputDir =
1375:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? outputDir : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${outputDir}`);
1376:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_output_dir', ok: true, details: effectiveOutputDir });
1377:   }
1378: 
1379:   try {
1380:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1381:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true });
1382:   } catch (error) {
1383:     const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1384:     if (!autoFixBaseline) {
1385:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1386:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1387:     }
1388: 
1389:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1390:     if (!rehydrated) {
1391:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1392:       remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: false, details: 'auto-fix failed' });
1393:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1394:     }
1395:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1396:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true, details: 'auto-fixed baseline rehydrate' });
1397:   }
1398:

452: 
453: async function restoreDependencyCacheArchive(
454:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
455:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
456:   bytes: Uint8Array
457: ): Promise<void> {
458:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
459:   const payload = toBase64(bytes);
460:   const tempPath = `/tmp/nimbus-cache-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)}.b64`;
461:   const reset = await sandbox.exec(`python3 - <<'PY'\nopen(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)}, 'wb').close()\nPY`);
462:   if (reset.exitCode !== 0) {
463:     const combined = [reset.stdout, reset.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
464:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to initialize dependency cache payload file');
465:   }
466: 
467:   const chunkSize = 8 * 1024;
468:   for (let offset = 0; offset < payload.length; offset += chunkSize) {
469:     const chunk = payload.slice(offset, offset + chunkSize);
470:     const append = await sandbox.exec(
471:       `python3 - <<'PY'\nwith open(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)}, 'ab') as f:\n    f.write(${JSON.stringify(chunk)}.encode('ascii'))\nPY`
472:     );
473:     if (append.exitCode !== 0) {
474:       const combined = [append.stdout, append.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
475:       throw new Error(combined || 'Failed while streaming dependency cache payload');
476:     }
477:   }
478: 
479:   const command =
480:     `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && mkdir -p ${shellQuote(projectRoot)} && python3 - <<'PY'\n` +
481:     `import base64\n` +
482:     `import pathlib\n` +
483:     `import subprocess\n` +
484:     `payload_path = pathlib.Path(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)})\n` +
485:     `raw = base64.b64decode(payload_path.read_bytes())\n` +
486:     `proc = subprocess.run(['tar', '-xzf', '-', '-C', '.'], input=raw)\n` +
487:     `payload_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n` +
488:     `raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)\n` +
489:     `PY`;
490:   const extract = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 });
491:   if (extract.exitCode !== 0) {
492:     const combined = [extract.stdout, extract.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
493:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to restore dependency cache archive');
494:   }
495: }

497: async function resolveRollbackContext(workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string, enabled: boolean, env: Env): Promise<unknown> {
498:   if (!enabled) {
499:     return { status: 'disabled' };
500:   }
501:   const previous = await getLatestSuccessfulWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId);
502:   if (!previous || previous.id === deploymentId) {
503:     return { status: 'no_previous_success' };
504:   }
505:   return {
506:     status: 'retained_previous',
507:     deploymentId: previous.id,
508:     deployedUrl: previous.deployedUrl,
509:     providerDeploymentId: previous.providerDeploymentId,
510:   };
511: }
512: 
513: async function resolveRollbackContextSafely(
514:   workspaceId: string,
515:   deploymentId: string,
516:   enabled: boolean,
517:   env: Env
518: ): Promise<unknown> {
519:   try {
520:     return await resolveRollbackContext(workspaceId, deploymentId, enabled, env);
521:   } catch (error) {
522:     return {
523:       status: 'lookup_failed',
524:       message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
525:     };
526:   }
527: }

1465: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1466:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1467:   if (!claimed) {
1468:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1469:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1470:       try {
1471:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1472:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1473:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1474:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1475:         }
1476:       }
1477:       return;
1478:     }
1479: 
1480:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1481:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1482:       return;
1483:     }
1484: 
1485:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1486:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1487:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1488:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1489:           return;
1490:         }
1491:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1492:           workspaceId,
1493:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1494:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1495:         });
1496:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1497:           workspaceId,
1498:           deploymentId,
1499:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1500:           payload: {
1501:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1502:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1503:           },
1504:         });
1505:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1506:           deploymentId,
1507:           status: 'failed',
1508:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1509:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1510:         });
1511:         return;
1512:       }
1513: 
1514:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1515:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1516:       }
1517: 
1518:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1519:     }
1520:     return;
1521:   }
1522: 
1523:   try {
1524:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1525:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1526:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1527:         workspaceId,
1528:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1529:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1530:       });
1531:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1532:         workspaceId,
1533:         deploymentId,
1534:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1535:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1536:       });
1537:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1538:         deploymentId,
1539:         status: 'failed',
1540:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1541:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1542:       });
1543:       return;
1544:     }
1545: 
1546:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1547:   } catch (error) {
1548:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1549:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1550:       try {
1551:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1552:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1553:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1554:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1555:         }
1556:       }
1557:       return;
1558:     }
1559: 
1560:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1561:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1562:       return;
1563:     }
1564: 
1565:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1566:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1567:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1568:         true
1569:       );
1570:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1571: 
1572:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1573:         workspaceId,
1574:         errorCode: error.code,
1575:         errorMessage: error.message,
1576:         result: { rollback },
1577:       });
1578:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1579:         workspaceId,
1580:         deploymentId,
1581:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1582:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1583:       });
1584:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1585:         deploymentId,
1586:         status: 'failed',
1587:         errorCode: error.code,
1588:         errorMessage: error.message,
1589:       });
1590:       return;
1591:     }
1592: 
1593:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1594:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1595:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1596:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1597:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1598:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1599:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1600:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1601: 
1602:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1603:           try {
1604:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1605:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1606:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1607:               workspaceId,
1608:               deploymentId,
1609:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1610:               payload: {
1611:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1612:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1613:                 retryPath: true,
1614:               },
1615:             });
1616:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1617:               await env.DB
1618:                 .prepare(
1619:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1620:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1621:                        updated_at = ?
1622:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1623:                 )
1624:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1625:                 .run();
1626:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1627:             }
1628:           } catch (providerCancelError) {
1629:             if (providerCancelError instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1630:               throw providerCancelError;
1631:             }
1632:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1633:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1634:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1635:             }
1636:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1637:           }
1638:         }
1639: 
1640:         if (shouldCancelLocally) {
1641:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1642:           return;
1643:         }
1644:       }
1645: 
1646:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1647:         workspaceId,
1648:         startedAt: null,
1649:         finishedAt: null,
1650:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1651:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1652:       });
1653:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1654:         workspaceId,
1655:         deploymentId,
1656:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1657:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
1658:       });
1659:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
1660:     }
1661: 
1662:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1663:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1664:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1665:       true
1666:     );
1667:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1668: 
1669:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1670:       workspaceId,
1671:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1672:       errorMessage: message,
1673:       result: { rollback },
1674:     });
1675:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1676:       workspaceId,
1677:       deploymentId,
1678:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1679:       payload: {
1680:         code: 'deployment_failed',
1681:         message,
1682:         rollback,
1683:       },
1684:     });
1685:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1686:       deploymentId,
1687:       status: 'failed',
1688:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1689:       errorMessage: message,
1690:     });
1691:   }
1692: }
1693: 
1694: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1695:   env: Env,
1696:   workspaceId: string,
1697:   deploymentId: string,
1698:   maxCycles = 8
1699: ): Promise<void> {
1700:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1701:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1702:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1703:       return false;
1704:     }
1705: 
1706:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1707:       return false;
1708:     }
1709: 
1710:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1711:       return false;
1712:     }
1713: 
1714:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1715:       workspaceId,
1716:       startedAt: null,
1717:       finishedAt: null,
1718:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1719:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1720:     });
1721:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1722:       workspaceId,
1723:       deploymentId,
1724:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1725:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
1726:     });
1727:     return true;
1728:   }
1729: 
1730:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1731:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
1732:     try {
1733:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1734:     } catch (error) {
1735:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1736:         return;
1737:       }
1738: 
1739:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {

<content>1: import type { Env, WorkspaceDeploymentStatus } from '../types.js';

3: export type WorkspaceDeployProviderName = 'simulated' | 'cloudflare_workers_assets';

42: class ProviderError extends Error {
43:   constructor(
44:     public readonly code:
45:       | 'provider_auth_failed'
46:       | 'provider_rate_limited'
47:       | 'provider_project_not_found'
48:       | 'provider_deploy_failed'
49:       | 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
50:       | 'provider_scope_missing',
51:     message: string
52:   ) {
53:     super(message);
54:     this.name = 'ProviderError';
55:   }
56: }
57: 
58: type ProviderFetch = typeof fetch;
59: 
60: let providerFetch: ProviderFetch = fetch;
61: 
62: export function setWorkspaceDeployProviderFetchForTests(fetchImpl: ProviderFetch | null): void {
63:   providerFetch = fetchImpl ?? fetch;
64: }
65: 
66: function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
67:   if (value === undefined) {
68:     return fallback;
69:   }
70:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
71:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
72:     return true;
73:   }
74:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
75:     return false;
76:   }
77:   return fallback;
78: }
79: 
80: function requireEnv(
81:   value: string | undefined,
82:   key: string,
83:   code: 'provider_auth_failed' | 'provider_scope_missing' | 'provider_deploy_failed' = 'provider_auth_failed'
84: ): string {
85:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim() === '') {
86:     throw new ProviderError(code, `Missing required provider env: ${key}`);
87:   }
88:   return value.trim();
89: }
90: 
91: function cloudflareErrorsMessage(input: unknown): string | null {
92:   if (!Array.isArray(input)) {
93:     return null;
94:   }
95:   const messages = input
96:     .map((item) => {
97:       if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') {
98:         return null;
99:       }
100:       const record = item as Record<string, unknown>;
101:       if (typeof record.message === 'string' && record.message.trim()) {
102:         return record.message.trim();
103:       }
104:       return null;
105:     })
106:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
107:   if (messages.length === 0) {
108:     return null;
109:   }
110:   return messages.join('; ');
111: }
112: 
113: function toBase64(bytes: Uint8Array): string {
114:   const alphabet = 'REDACTED/';
115:   let output = '';
116:   for (let index = 0; index < bytes.length; index += 3) {
117:     const a = bytes[index] ?? 0;
118:     const b = bytes[index + 1] ?? 0;
119:     const c = bytes[index + 2] ?? 0;
120:     const value = (a << 16) | (b << 8) | c;
121:     output += alphabet[(value >> 18) & 63] ?? '';
122:     output += alphabet[(value >> 12) & 63] ?? '';
123:     output += index + 1 < bytes.length ? alphabet[(value >> 6) & 63] ?? '' : '=';
124:     output += index + 2 < bytes.length ? alphabet[value & 63] ?? '' : '=';
125:   }
126:   return output;
127: }
128: 
129: function isValidRelativeOutputDir(value: string): boolean {
130:   if (!value || value === '.') {
131:     return false;
132:   }
133:   if (value.startsWith('/') || value.includes('..') || value.includes('\\')) {
134:     return false;
135:   }
136:   return value.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
137: }
138: 
139: function mapProviderState(input: string): WorkspaceDeploymentStatus {
140:   const normalized = input.trim().toLowerCase();
141:   if (normalized === 'queued' || normalized === 'pending') {
142:     return 'queued';
143:   }
144:   if (normalized === 'running' || normalized === 'in_progress' || normalized === 'processing') {
145:     return 'running';
146:   }
147:   if (normalized === 'succeeded' || normalized === 'success' || normalized === 'completed' || normalized === 'active') {
148:     return 'succeeded';
149:   }
150:   if (normalized === 'cancelled' || normalized === 'canceled') {
151:     return 'cancelled';
152:   }
153:   return 'failed';
154: }

156: class SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
157:   readonly name = 'simulated' as const;
158: 
159:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {}
160: 
161:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
162:     return [{ code: 'provider_simulated', ok: true, details: 'simulated provider selected' }];
163:   }
164: 
165:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
166:     const deployBase = (this.env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_BASE_URL ?? 'https://deployments.nimbus.local').replace(/\/+$/, '');
167:     return {
168:       providerDeploymentId: input.deploymentId,
169:       status: 'succeeded',
170:       deployedUrl: `${deployBase}/${input.workspaceId}/${input.deploymentId}`,
171:     };
172:   }
173: 
174:   async getDeploymentStatus(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
175:     return { status: 'succeeded', deployedUrl: null };

183: class CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
184:   readonly name = 'cloudflare_workers_assets' as const;
185:   private readonly accountId: string;
186:   private readonly apiToken: string;
187:   private readonly previewDomain: string;
188:   private readonly projectName: string;
189: 
190:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {
191:     this.accountId = requireEnv(env.CF_ACCOUNT_ID, 'CF_ACCOUNT_ID');
192:     this.apiToken = requireEnv(env.CF_API_TOKEN, 'CF_API_TOKEN');
193:     this.previewDomain = requireEnv(
194:       env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN,
195:       'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN',
196:       'provider_deploy_failed'
197:     );
198:     this.projectName = requireEnv(
199:       env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME,
200:       'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME',
201:       'provider_deploy_failed'
202:     );
203: 
204:     if (!parseBoolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED, false)) {
205:       throw new ProviderError(
206:         'provider_deploy_failed',
207:         'Real deploy provider is disabled; set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED=true to enable'
208:       );
209:     }
210:   }
211: 
212:   private request(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<Response> {
213:     return providerFetch(`https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4${path}`, {
214:       ...init,
215:       headers: {
216:         Authorization: `Bearer ${this.apiToken}`,
217:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
218:         ...(init?.headers ?? {}),
219:       },
220:     });
221:   }
222: 
223:   private async parseCloudflareResult(response: Response): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
224:     const text = await response.text();
225:     let parsed: Record<string, unknown> = {};
226:     try {
227:       parsed = JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, unknown>;
228:     } catch {
229:       parsed = {};
230:     }
231: 
232:     if (response.status === 401) {
233:       throw new ProviderError('provider_auth_failed', 'Cloudflare API token is invalid');
234:     }
235:     if (response.status === 403) {
236:       throw new ProviderError('provider_scope_missing', 'Cloudflare API token is missing required scopes');
237:     }
238:     if (response.status === 404) {
239:       throw new ProviderError('provider_project_not_found', `Cloudflare project ${this.projectName} was not found`);
240:     }
241:     if (response.status === 429) {
242:       throw new ProviderError('provider_rate_limited', 'Cloudflare API rate limit exceeded');
243:     }
244:     if (!response.ok) {
245:       const errorMessage =
246:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
247:         (typeof parsed.errors === 'object' && parsed.errors !== null
248:           ? JSON.stringify(parsed.errors)
249:           : text || `Cloudflare API request failed with status ${response.status}`);
250:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
251:     }
252: 
253:     if (parsed.success === false) {
254:       const errorMessage =
255:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
256:         `Cloudflare API reported success=false${response.status ? ` (status ${response.status})` : ''}`;
257:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
258:     }
259: 
260:     return parsed;
261:   }
262: 
263:   private previewUrlForDeployment(deploymentId: string): string {
264:     return `https://dep-${deploymentId}.${this.previewDomain}`;
265:   }
266: 
267:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
268:     const checks: WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[] = [];
269:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_real_enabled', ok: true });
270:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_credentials_present', ok: true });
271: 
272:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`);
273:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
274:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_project_access', ok: true });
275:     return checks;
276:   }
277: 
278:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
279:     if (!isValidRelativeOutputDir(input.outputDir)) {
280:       throw new ProviderError(
281:         'provider_invalid_output_dir',
282:         'deploy.outputDir must be a safe non-root relative directory path'
283:       );
284:     }
285: 
286:     const uploadResponse = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/assets/upload`, {
287:       method: 'POST',
288:       body: JSON.stringify({
289:         deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
290:         output_dir: input.outputDir,
291:         artifact_sha256: input.outputBundle.sha256,
292:         artifact_bytes: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
293:         artifact_base64: toBase64(input.outputBundle.bytes),
294:       }),
295:     });
296:     const uploadParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(uploadResponse);
297:     const uploadResult =
298:       typeof uploadParsed.result === 'object' && uploadParsed.result !== null
299:         ? (uploadParsed.result as Record<string, unknown>)
300:         : {};
301:     const assetUploadId =
302:       typeof uploadResult.upload_id === 'string' && uploadResult.upload_id.trim()
303:         ? uploadResult.upload_id.trim()
304:         : `upload_${input.deploymentId}`;
305: 
306:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments`, {
307:       method: 'POST',
308:       body: JSON.stringify({
309:         deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
310:         alias: `dep-${input.deploymentId}`,
311:         output_dir: input.outputDir,
312:         asset_upload_id: assetUploadId,
313:         preview_url: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
314:       }),
315:     });
316:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
317:     const result =
318:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
319:     const providerDeploymentId =
320:       typeof result.id === 'string' && result.id.trim() ? result.id.trim() : `cfdep_${input.deploymentId}`;
321: 
322:     return {
323:       providerDeploymentId,
324:       status: 'running',
325:       deployedUrl: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
326:     };
327:   }
328: 
329:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
330:     const response = await this.request(
331:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}`
332:     );
333:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
334:     const result =
335:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
336:     const state = typeof result.status === 'string' ? mapProviderState(result.status) : 'running';
337:     return {
338:       status: state,
339:       deployedUrl: typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim() ? result.preview_url : null,
340:       errorCode: typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined,
341:       errorMessage: typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined,
342:     };
343:   }
344: 
345:   async cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
346:     const response = await this.request(
347:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}/cancel`,
348:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
349:     );
350: 
351:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {
352:       return { accepted: false };
353:     }
354: 
355:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
356:     return { accepted: true };
357:   }
358: }
359: 
360: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
361:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {
362:     if (input === 'simulated' || input === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
363:       return input;
364:     }
365:   }
366: 
367:   if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
368:     return 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
369:   }
370: 
371:   return 'simulated';
372: }
373: 
374: export function createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName: WorkspaceDeployProviderName, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProvider {
375:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
376:     return new CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider(env);
377:   }
378:   return new SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider(env);
379: }
380: 
381: export function normalizeProviderError(error: unknown): { code: string; message: string } {
382:   if (error instanceof ProviderError) {
383:     return { code: error.code, message: error.message };
384:   }
385: 
386:   if (error instanceof Error) {
387:     return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: error.message };
388:   }
389: 
390:   return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: String(error) };
391: }

(End of file - total 391 lines)
</content>

parts.text:
No blockers remain from this pass.

- I reviewed the updated `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts` flow around provider creation, persistence, cancel/retry handling, and terminal-state reconciliation.
- `providerDeploymentId` is now persisted immediately after provider creation via `updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(..., 'running', { providerDeploymentId })`, and it is also written on success paths.
- Retry-path cancellation now correctly uses persisted `providerDeploymentId` when available, which addresses the earlier blocker class.
- I also ran the worker test suite (`pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker test`); all tests passed, including `workspace-deployment-runner` and `workspace-deploy-provider`.

If you want, I can do one extra narrow pass for only crash-window/idempotency edge cases (non-blocker hardening).
